seo.title: GANBARANBA | Tonkotsu Ramen · Cairns
seo.description: Hakata-style tonkotsu ramen, chashu, and house favourites — Shop 7/8, 14 Spence St, Cairns City. Lunch & dinner; closed Wednesdays.

hero.eyebrow: Japanese ramen · Since Cairns locals’ favourite nights
hero.title: GANBARAN
descriptionLines: Slow-simmered tonkotsu, blistered chashu, and springy noodles —
steps from the Esplanade in the Cairns CBD.

features.title: Tonkotsu broth
features.desc: Pork bones simmered for hours until the soup turns creamy — the base of our Hakata-style bowls.

features.title: Chashu & toppings
features.desc: Blistered pork belly, seasoned egg, bean sprouts, and negi — balanced for the tropics.

features.title: Cairns CBD
features.desc: Tucked in Boland's Centre on Spence St — easy stop before or after the Lagoon and Esplanade.

images.alt: Tonkotsu ramen bowl with egg and chashu

menu.footerNote: Hours and menu may change — check the venue’s Facebook or call before you visit. Tell staff about allergens.

items.name: Tonkotsu Ramen
items.desc: Classic pork broth, chashu, egg, bean sprouts, sesame

items.name: Black Garlic Tonkotsu
items.desc: Rich broth with garlic oil — extra depth

items.name: Spicy Miso Ramen
items.desc: Miso blend with chilli heat; chashu & veg

items.name: Shoyu Ramen
items.desc: Clear chicken & soy soup, lighter but still full

address.label: Address
lines: 14 Spence St, Cairns City QLD 4870, Australia

hours.label: Hours
lines: Lunch & dinner Mon, Tue, Thu, Fri, Sat, Sun (closed Wednesdays)
Typical: lunch 11:30am–2:00pm · dinner 5:00pm–8:00pm — confirm on Facebook

reservation.title: Walk-ins & groups
reservation.subtitle: Drop in for a bowl; call ahead if you’re a large group or visiting on a busy night.

footer.subLine: Tonkotsu ramen · Cairns — sales demo sample; verify hours and phone on the official Facebook page before publishing
